name: I Do Not Forgive Those Who Laugh at My Family!!!
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Main]/[Counter] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Donquixote Pirates" type card other than [I Do Not Forgive Those Who Laugh at My Family!!!] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
